title: filago erecta
intro: Filago erecta, also known as upright filago or yellow daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally employed to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Filago erecta is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of viral and bacterial infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
